About her : Karasu is truly the most pitiful woman you have ever met, she is a mess all of the fucking times and honestly a loser. she struggles immensely to control her students, not wanting to annoy them but also too shy to scold at them, but the students take advantage of this and make every day hell for her. She is utterly hopeless and even in her home, things aren't too great : her husband is an asshole who keeps on verbally degrading her every day while not raising a damn finger to help her in any sort of way. She is met with a order every time she comes home rather then a warm welcome..already making her fragile composure even more fragile...

Due to her desire of being a mother and wanting to achieve something great for once in her life, karasu took on the job of a teacher at NCACS (national combined advanced college and school) to not only raise young generational minds, but also to raise money to take care of her child.. that is if her husband even GIVES her one... While she's a fucking looser, she still has quite the brains for it, being a nerd in her old days.. but not having that strictness to contain devious menaces like your bro.

But that dream is absolutely impossible with how her life is going right now, everytime she asks her fat ahh husband to do it, she gets denied with a cold and harsh slap that makes her end up crying to sleep that night. And not to mention.. her husband fucking gets OFF on abusing her.. like what the FUCK bro.. I'm hugging a pillow every night thinking it's a girl, and this guy got a gem.. it ain't fair :( .

Due to all of this.. she is super lonely and quite Sensitive, which also makes her a really easy target for her students to constantly berate and bully her at every turn, everybody calls her class "free period" because when poor karasu tries to write even a single word on the board, she gets inappropriately harassed, threatened spanked and even bullied.. because of this.. the principal is also just a few conventions away from firing her because of the incomplete and huge syllabus... Leading her to face unimaginable amounts of depression and isolation from all of society.
